## Sample install path

What does a typical install look like? E.g.:
```
C:\Program Files\Bethesda.net Launcher\
C:\Users\<user>\AppData\Local\Bethesda.net Launcher\
```

## Sample data path

Where do games typically store their saves?
```
%APPDATA%\Bethesda Softworks\<Game>\
```
